title: The Krieg Pirates Bring War to the Baratie
description: On pages 8–11, Don Krieg’s arrival turns the Baratie crisis into a pirate siege while Nami’s departure and the looming fight split the crew’s attention.
scene: The Baratie becomes trapped between hungry enemies, terrified cooks, Krieg’s overwhelming force, and the Straw Hats’ personal priorities.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Just keep your mouth shut.

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: You planning to rumble, Luffyy?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Need a hand?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Oh hey, Zoro, UsoppP.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: No it's fine, you can just stay sitting down.

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Ha...

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Ha Ha Ha! Ha!

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Ahahaha! Those are your crewmates?

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: A rather small bunch, aren't they!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: What're you talking about!? I've got 2 others as well!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Hey, you just counted me in, didn't you?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Don't joke with me, punk! Even my fleet of 50 ships and sooo pirates,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: were utterly decimated by that devilish sea in just 7 days only because we lacked information!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: S-Seven Days!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: The entire Krig pirate fleet was annillated in just a week!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: j-just what exactly happened to them!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: D'you hear that just now!? So ships gone! In just a single week!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Heh, sounds interesting.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Even as a bluff, your comments just now show how completely ignorant you are to reality! If there's one thing I hate, it's empty boasting like yours!

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Keep saying that and I'll kill you right on the spot once I get back from unloading this food!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: As for the rest of you...

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: I'll give you a little extension.

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: I'm going to go give this food to my subordinates,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: And then return back here.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: I'd suggest you leave this place within that time if you don't want to die.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: The only things I need are this ship and Zeff's travel log.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: If any of you still feel like dying even after I warned you,

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Then so be it!

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: I'll bury you to the bottom of the sea for eternity!

summary: This part escalates the Baratie arc from character introduction to open conflict, with Krieg threatening the restaurant and Nami pulling the story toward Arlong Park.
